text.title: pm-certification-alignment-2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pm-certification-alignment-2026 as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent recommends allocating 33% of study time to People domain because it is 33% of the exam weight.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Domain-weight allocation ignores individual candidate gaps; the correct allocation is weight multiplied by gap (1 - current coverage), not weight alone.

failure-mode.description: Agent-generated practice questions include verbatim ECO wording or known exam questions.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: PMI prohibits posting verbatim exam content; questions must be rephrased with scenario context added. Auto-generated questions must pass an SME review before any distribution.

failure-mode.description: Agent generates dates for a study plan ("Week 5: Mar 12") without computing from the candidate's actual exam date.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hard-coded dates misalign with every candidate's actual timeline; compute dates via Python from the exam date input, never inline in the LLM output.
